explicit_text: I've been practicing as a family physician in Chelan, Washington for about 12 years now. I do both inpatient and outpatient work here, including procedures like colonoscopies and surgical OB. Chelan is where I also help cover hospital call and work closely with residents and students through local training programs.
implicit_text: I've been practicing as a family physician in a small city in central Washington for about 12 years now. I do both inpatient and outpatient work here, including procedures like colonoscopies and surgical OB. This is where I also help cover hospital call and work closely with residents and students through local training programs.

explicit_text: I have a teaching role with the University of Washington, where I'm involved in family medicine education. Specifically, I'm part of their rural training tracks, including TRUST and WRITE, and also serve as faculty for the Family Medicine Rural Training Track. This connection allows me to help train residents and students in rural healthcare settings.
implicit_text: I have a teaching role with a major public research university in Seattle, where I'm involved in family medicine education. Specifically, I'm part of their rural training tracks, including TRUST and WRITE, and also serve as faculty for the Family Medicine Rural Training Track. This connection allows me to help train residents and students in rural healthcare settings.

explicit_text: I'm part of the Targeted Rural and Underserved Track, or TRUST, through the University of Washington. This program focuses on training physicians to serve in rural and underserved communities like Chelan. Being involved in TRUST helps me support residents who want to practice in similar settings and ensures they get relevant clinical experience.
implicit_text: I'm part of a specialized rural and underserved community training track affiliated with the university in Seattle. This program focuses on training physicians to serve in rural and underserved communities like the one where I practice. Being involved in this track helps me support residents who want to practice in similar settings and ensures they get relevant clinical experience.

explicit_text: I also participate in the WWAMI Rural Integrated Training Experience, known as WRITE, which is another University of Washington program. WRITE is designed to provide rural clinical training for medical students and residents. Through this, I supervise and mentor trainees, helping them gain hands-on experience in rural healthcare delivery.
implicit_text: I also participate in a rural integrated training experience program connected to the Seattle-based university. This program is designed to provide rural clinical training for medical students and residents. Through this, I supervise and mentor trainees, helping them gain hands-on experience in rural healthcare delivery.

explicit_text: The first moment I really felt the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic was during a family vacation in Mexico early in 2020. Things were just starting to escalate globally, and it was stressful not knowing if we could get back home safely. When we returned, our clinic shifted abruptly from all in-person visits to mostly phone calls, and later telehealth, which was a big adjustment. The pandemic also affected local businesses, schools, and community activities in Chelan, and changed how we worked and taught medical students.
implicit_text: The first moment I really felt the impact of the global viral outbreak was during a family vacation in Mexico early in 2020. Things were just starting to escalate worldwide, and it was stressful not knowing if we could get back home safely. When we returned, our clinic shifted abruptly from all in-person visits to mostly phone calls, and later telehealth, which was a big adjustment. The outbreak also affected local businesses, schools, and community activities in my town, and changed how we worked and taught medical students.
cues: clinic shift to phone and telehealth
impact on local businesses and schools

explicit_text: In early 2020, my family and I were on vacation in Mexico when the COVID-19 pandemic started to rapidly develop. We were uncertain about travel safety and whether we could return home, which made the trip quite stressful. Ultimately, we stayed until our scheduled flight home, just before borders closed, making it a memorable and tense experience.
implicit_text: In early 2020, my family and I were on vacation in a popular North American country known for its beaches and resorts when the global viral outbreak started to rapidly develop. We were uncertain about travel safety and whether we could return home, which made the trip quite stressful. Ultimately, we stayed until our scheduled flight home, just before borders closed, making it a memorable and tense experience.

explicit_text: During the pandemic, ensuring we had adequate personal protective equipment, or PPE, was a major focus at our clinic. Our chief medical officer, who also serves as the health district officer, helped guide us in implementing safety measures. Having the right PPE was essential for protecting staff, residents, and patients as we adapted to new protocols and continued clinical care.
implicit_text: During the pandemic, ensuring we had adequate protective gear was a major focus at our clinic. explicit_text: Telehealth became a critical part of how we delivered care during the COVID-19 pandemic. Initially, we relied on phone calls, but within weeks, our organization quickly implemented telehealth visits. While there were some technical challenges, telehealth allowed us to continue managing patients effectively and has now become a lasting option for convenient care, especially for follow-ups and routine visits.
implicit_text: Remote healthcare delivery became a critical part of how we provided care during the viral outbreak. Initially, we relied on phone calls, but within weeks, our organization quickly implemented video visits. While there were some technical challenges, this approach allowed us to continue managing patients effectively and has now become a lasting option for convenient care, especially for follow-ups and routine visits.

explicit_text: Zoom Video Communications became an important tool for our remote meetings during the pandemic. We realized that many meetings didn't require everyone to be physically present, and Zoom allowed us to connect efficiently from different locations. This shift has been a big convenience and is likely to continue as part of our routine work even as things return to normal.
